introduction.p: Sportsball is a game similar to basketball. There are three ways for a team to score points: a long field goal earns L points; a short field goal earns S points; and a penalty shot earns P points.
In the first half of one game, a team scored 8 penalty shots, 18 long field goals, and 22 short field goals. So they earned {8P+18L+22S} points.

statement.p: In the second half of the game, that same team scored 11 penalty shots, 21 long field goals, and 43 short field goals. How many points did they earn during the second half?
How many points did the team score in total?
